text:
is a hamster owned by Dieter Ness.

Appearance

Charrette is covered in short brown fur with a thick tuft of darker fur atop her head. Being a hamster, she is very small in stature and has rounded ears.

Story

During the summer festival, Charrette is with Ness while he runs his shooting gallery. When Eren and his friends take an interest in it, Ness introduces himself and Charrette. She and Ness lose their enthusiasm after Mikasa and Annie keep winning all the prizes at his gallery.
